title: Time To Get Bullish Again On Crude
section_path: Time To Get Bullish Again On Crude
section_path_text: Time To Get Bullish Again On Crude
summary:
Main
Numerous structural and seasonal factors are pointing to higher crude prices in the coming months, and onshore crude inventories are already drawing right now. By David Wech
Most investors and oil traders started the year 2023 with a bullish outlook on crude prices, primarily driven by strong oil demand growth expectations of around 2mbd. That was particularly palpable at the IE Week in London in late February.
